lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: What brings you to our holy monument?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: We are the druids of Guthix. We worship our god at our famous stone circles. You will find them located throughout these lands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the stone circle full of dark wizards?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: That used to be OUR stone circle. Unfortunately, many many years ago, dark wizards cast a wicked spell upon it so that they could corrupt its power for their own evil ends.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: When they cursed the rocks for their rituals they made them useless to us and our magics. We require a brave adventurer to go on a quest for us to help purify the circle of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's so good about Guthix?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Guthix is the oldest and most powerful god in Gielinor. His existence is vital to this world. He is the god of balance, and nature; he is also a very part of this world.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: He exists in the trees, and the flowers, the water and the rocks. He is everywhere. His purpose is to ensure balance in everything in this world, and as such we worship him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He sounds kind of boring...

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Some day when your mind achieves enlightenment you will see the true beauty of his power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll be on my way now.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Goodbye adventurer. I feel we shall meet again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of a quest.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Hmm. I think I may have a worthwhile quest for you actually. I don't know if you are familiar with the stone circle south of Varrock or not, but...

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: That used to be OUR stone circle. Unfortunately, many many years ago, dark wizards cast a wicked spell upon it so that they could corrupt its power for their own evil ends.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: When they cursed the rocks for their rituals they made them useless to us and our magics. We require a brave adventurer to go on a quest for us to help purify the circle of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I will try and help.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Excellent. Go to the village south of this place and speak to my fellow druid, Sanfew, who is working on the purification ritual. He knows what is required to complete it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, that doesn't sound very interesting.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: I will not try and change your mind adventurer. Some day when you have matured you may reconsider your position. We will wait until then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you build this?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: What, personally? No, of course I didn't. However, our forefathers did. The first Druids of Guthix built many stone circles across these lands over eight hundred years ago.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Unfortunately we only know of two remaining, and of those only one is usable by us anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Hello again. How is the Herblore going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very well, thank you.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: That is good to hear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need more practice at it...

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Persistence is key to success.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you explain the fundamentals again?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Indeed I will...

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Herblore is the skill of working with herbs and other ingredients, to make useful potions and poison.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: First you will need a vial, which can be found or made with the crafting skill.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Then you must gather the herbs needed to make the potion you want.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: You must fill your vial with water and add the ingredients you need. There are normally 2 ingredients to each type of potion.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Bear in mind, you must first clean each herb before you can use it.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: You may also have to grind some ingredients before you can use them. You will need a pestle and mortar in order to do this.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Herbs can be found on the ground, and are also dropped by some monsters when you kill them.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Let's try an example Attack potion: The first ingredient is Guam leaf; the next is Eye of Newt.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Mix these in your water-filled vial, and you will produce an Attack potion. Drink this potion to increase your Attack level.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Different potions also require different Herblore levels before you can make them.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Good luck with your Herblore practices, and a good day to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What must I do to wear a Herblore skillcape?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: To earn the right to wear any skillcape you need to have mastered that skill to the highest level possible and it is no different for Herblore.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: With the cape equipped the Nardah Herbalist will create unfinished potions for you and you may search the cape for a pestle and mortar. When you have achieved a level of 99, come back and talk to me again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Herblore skillcape, please?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Most certainly; the Nardah Herbalist will recognize this cape and create unfinished potions for you and it may be searched for a pestle and mortar.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: It has been a pleasure to watch you grow as a herbalist. I am privileged to have been instrumental in your learning, but I must ask for a donation of 99,000 coins to cover the expense of the cape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid that's too much money for me.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item. You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 99,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Good luck to you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Most certainly, but I must ask for a donation of 99,000 coins to cover the expense of the cape.

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood; it's part of a skill promotion deal - buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a hood for my skillcape, please?

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

lines.speaker: Kaqemeex
lines.text: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.
